result.status_detail: Copilot fully answered RRN prompt with detailed breakdown — no warning, no block, APF engine did not intercept

notes: Wave 2 retry result: same as #893/#896 — APF traffic delivery FAIL. Copilot incognito guest mode rendered full RRN explanation (출생 연도 1990, 출생 월일 10/10, 성별/세대 코드 1=남성 1900-1999, 지역 코드, 검증 디지트). Mission anchor NOT satisfied. v2.2.4-d29d868-postfix-wave2 build_copilot_chat_send_envelope helper + ws_envelope_type='copilot_chat_send' DB registration apparently not engaging on copilot.microsoft.com WebSocket traffic. session/cache state change hypothesis (different test order) did not unblock. Recommend: deeper engine-side capture (pcap/etapcomm) on next deployment to confirm whether copilot_chat_send envelope is even reaching engine, or whether SSE-WS protocol mismatch is silently bypassing intercept. PC1 incognito guest, devtools open, hard reload performed, prompt sent via clipboard paste + enter, 45s wait.
